title: juncus divergens
intro: Juncus divergens, also known as Creeping Rush, is a type of aquatic or semi-aquatic plant belonging to the Juncaceae family. Traditionally, Creeping Rush has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve coughs and congestion. In herbal preparations, Creeping Rush is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its health benefits and is also used topically to soothe skin irritations.
